unsupported_implied.text: Nightly ChoiceParts data refresh must not require application downtime; the application must remain available during the nightly data refresh unless a scheduled outage is explicitly planned.
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: During the nightly data refresh, we still expect the app to be up, unless the schedule says otherwise.
unsupported_implied.reason: The sources explicitly state the expectation that the app remain up during the nightly feed refresh. The gold set specifies the daily feed timing and general availability/maintenance windows but does not state that the nightly synchronization must not cause downtime; this is a distinct operational requirement.

unsupported_implied.text: Recycled-parts search results must be snapshotted and immutably tied to the specific estimate so that later audits reference exactly what the estimator saw even if the parts feed or inventory changes afterward.
unsupported_implied.source_snippet: Keep those results tied to the estimate so later, when the adjuster runs the audit, it references exactly what I saw.
unsupported_implied.reason: While the gold set requires the system to retain search results for audit, the source explicitly requires those results to be tied to the estimate as an immutable snapshot (i.e., audit must reference exactly the original result set despite later feed changes). This immutability/snapshot semantics is not stated in the gold requirements.
